fault_injection.purpose: Deterministic route/browser injection; never requires a private service or credential.

lance_append_target.purpose: A pre-existing registerable Lance dataset in the outputs destination so the default-journey acceptance can certify a managed-local Lance append and its idempotent retry.

medium_catalog.purpose: Catalog paging, search, folders, and more-than-100-result behavior.

relationship_dense.purpose: Dense join and lineage rendering with bounded result disclosure.

small_happy_path.purpose: Three related starter datasets for discovery, preview, transform, and export.
